summary: Iteration 217 - Phase A Features Testing Complete. All backend APIs (17/17 tests passed) and frontend UI features verified: (1) Unified Cosmic State endpoint with tier-gated data, (2) Sovereign Codex help system with Nano-Guide tooltips, (3) Mission Control raycaster transparency fix (pointer-events: none), (4) Star Chart matrix transform integration, (5) Five Elements Wheel real-time ODE energy indicators.
critical_code_review_comments: cosmic_state.py: Unified endpoint correctly gates data by tier (Observer→Sovereign)
sovereign_math.py: ODE solver uses RK4 integration with proper circadian modulation
sovereign_codex.py: Nano-guides return exactly 3 tips per section as specified
MissionControl.js: Backdrop has pointer-events: none for 3D click-through
FiveElementsWheel.js: Energy arcs render proportional to ODE energy levels (0-3 range → 270° arc)
NanoGuide.js: Tooltips appear on all specified pages (Botany, Trade Circle, Star Chart, Suanpan, Mission Control)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 217 verified Phase A features: (1) GET /api/cosmic-state returns tier-gated data bundle (energies, stability, derivatives for Synthesizer+, trajectory for Archivist+, chaos for Sovereign). (2) GET /api/math/element-ode returns 25-point ODE trajectory. (3) GET /api/math/garden-derivative returns stability (stable/shifting/volatile). (4) POST /api/math/matrix-transform returns Rodrigues rotation keyframes. (5) POST /api/math/chaos-predict returns 403 for non-Sovereign users. (6) GET /api/codex/entries returns tier-filtered entries with locked/unlocked state. (7) GET /api/codex/nano-guide/{id} returns 3 tips for each section. (8) /codex route renders Sovereign Codex page with search, filters, tier badges. (9) NanoGuide tooltips appear on Botany, Trade Circle, Star Chart, Suanpan, Mission Control pages. (10) Five Elements Wheel shows ODE energy arcs and stability indicator. (11) Mission Control backdrop has pointer-events: none for 3D click-through.

cosmic_state_endpoint.details: GET /api/cosmic-state returns tier-gated data: energies, stability, derivatives (Synthesizer+), trajectory (Archivist+), chaos (Sovereign)

element_ode_endpoint.details: GET /api/math/element-ode returns 25-point ODE trajectory with analysis for Archivist tier

matrix_transform_endpoint.details: POST /api/math/matrix-transform returns Rodrigues rotation keyframes (21 frames for 20 steps)

chaos_predict_tier_gating.details: POST /api/math/chaos-predict returns 403 for non-Sovereign users (Archivist tier tested)

codex_entries_endpoint.details: GET /api/codex/entries returns tier-filtered entries with locked/unlocked state, section filters, search

nano_guide_endpoints.details: All nano-guide endpoints return 3 tips: five-elements-wheel, trade-circle, mission-control, star-chart, suanpan-mixer, botany

codex_page_ui.details: Codex page renders with search, section filters (All, Botany, Elements, Mastery, Mathematics, Navigation, Resonance, Trade), tier badges

nano_guide_tooltips_ui.details: NanoGuide tooltips (purple ? icons) appear on Botany, Trade Circle, Star Chart, Suanpan Mixer, Mission Control pages

five_elements_wheel_energy_arcs.details: Five Elements Wheel shows 5 ODE energy arc paths around element nodes, stability indicator shows 'volatile' (red)

mission_control_raycaster_fix.details: Mission Control backdrop has pointer-events: none for 3D click-through, 6 action buttons with pulse animations
